title: Increased Wheat Drops
description: A simple mod which increases wheat drops
body:
A simple mod which increases wheat dropped per harvest to 2-3

 
Curseforge Page: (https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/increased-wheat-drops)

Github: https://github.com/GameBoi1232/Increased-Wheat-Drops

 

This will be the first of many small qol mods I will make

I will try to release a NeoForge version of the mod soon

Report any bugs or suggestions you have in the Curseforge comments
